plugins.name: GitHub Issues
plugins.description: Browse open GitHub issues across your repos (via the gh CLI) or one repo in a searchable, sortable dialog; click one to drop a prompt asking the agent to open and review it. The prompt template is editable in settings.
plugins.author: Cockpit

versions.notes: gh CLI support, cross-repo issues, searchable/sortable dialog.

plugins.name: GitHub Pull Requests
plugins.description: Shows up to 5 open GitHub pull requests inline under the session list (via the gh CLI across your repos, or one repo), plus a dialog listing every open PR in a searchable, sortable grid; click one to drop a prompt asking the agent to review it. The prompt template is editable in settings.
plugins.author: Cockpit

versions.notes: Initial release. Inline Open PRs section + all-PRs dialog, gh CLI or single-repo HTTP.

plugins.name: YouTrack
plugins.description: Shows up to 5 open YouTrack issues inline under the session list for a configured project (over HTTP with a permanent token — YouTrack has no CLI), plus a dialog listing every open issue in a searchable, sortable grid; click one to drop a prompt asking the agent to work on it. The prompt template is editable in settings.
plugins.author: Cockpit

versions.notes: Initial release. Per-project open issues over the YouTrack REST API.
